credit: Smithery — composite middle-of-stack model. Side faces split into two halves: top half samples the open-top half of forge_fuel_port_bottom (which is the bottom-of-stack texture, so its top half is the open continuation upward). Bottom half samples the open-bottom half of forge_fuel_port_top (top-of-stack texture, its bottom half is the open continuation downward). Top + bottom of the block use furnace_bricks like the other variants. Internal up/down faces between the two halves are omitted to avoid z-fighting.
